GET /accounts/{account_id}/logs/explorer.description:
Returns all Log Explorer datasets configured for the account.

Pass `include_zones=true` to also include zone-level datasets that
belong to this account. List responses omit the `fields` property;
use the single-dataset endpoint to retrieve field configuration.

parameters.description: Set to true to include zone-scoped datasets belonging to this account.
parameters.name: include_zones

items.description:
A Log Explorer dataset summary. List endpoints return this type and omit
field configuration; use the single-dataset endpoint to retrieve it.

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp recording when the API created this dataset.

enabled.description: Whether log ingest is currently active for this dataset.

object_id.description: Public ID of the account or zone that owns this dataset.

object_type.description: Whether this dataset belongs to an account or a zone.

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp recording when the API last updated this dataset.

200.description: The datasets the account has configured.

400.description: Invalid request, unsupported dataset, or invalid field configuration.

403.description: The caller lacks permission or entitlement to access this resource.

404.description: The requested resource does not exist.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/logs/explorer.description: Retrieve a single Log Explorer dataset by ID for the account.

allOf.description:
A Log Explorer dataset summary. List endpoints return this type and omit
field configuration; use the single-dataset endpoint to retrieve it.

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp recording when the API created this dataset.

enabled.description: Whether log ingest is currently active for this dataset.

object_id.description: Public ID of the account or zone that owns this dataset.

object_type.description: Whether this dataset belongs to an account or a zone.

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp recording when the API last updated this dataset.

fields.description: The field configuration for this dataset.

enabled.description: Whether the API includes this field in log ingest.

200.description: Dataset details, including the fields active for ingestion.

400.description: Invalid request, unsupported dataset, or invalid field configuration.

403.description: The caller lacks permission or entitlement to access this resource.

404.description: The requested resource does not exist.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/logs/explorer.description:
Returns all dataset types that this account can create. Each entry
includes the dataset schema and timestamp field.

The schema shows all possible fields for a dataset. However, not all
fields may be available for your account. When creating or updating a
dataset, only fields available to your account can be enabled. If you
request a field that is not available, you will receive an error.

items.description: A dataset type that the account or zone can create.

object_type.description: Whether this dataset type is account-scoped or zone-scoped.

schema.description: JSON Schema that describes the fields this dataset exposes.

timestamp_field.description: The primary timestamp field name for this dataset.

200.description: List of dataset types available to create.

400.description: Invalid request, unsupported dataset, or invalid field configuration.

403.description: The caller lacks permission or entitlement to access this resource.

404.description: The requested resource does not exist.

GET /zones/{zone_id}/logs/explorer/datas.description:
Returns all Log Explorer datasets configured for the zone.

List responses omit the `fields` property; use the single-dataset
endpoint to retrieve field configuration.

403.description: The caller lacks permission or entitlement to access this resource.

404.description: The requested resource does not exist.

GET /zones/{zone_id}/logs/explorer/datas.description:
Returns all dataset types that this zone can create. Each entry includes
the dataset schema and timestamp field.

The schema shows all possible fields for a dataset. However, not all
fields may be available for your account. When creating or updating a
dataset, only fields available to your account can be enabled. If you
request a field that is not available, you will receive an error.

object_type.description: Whether this dataset type is account-scoped or zone-scoped.

schema.description: JSON Schema that describes the fields this dataset exposes.

timestamp_field.description: The primary timestamp field name for this dataset.

200.description: List of dataset types available to create.

400.description: Invalid request, unsupported dataset, or invalid field configuration.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/logs/explore.description:
Create a new Log Explorer dataset for the account.

Use the `/accounts/{account_id}/logs/explorer/datasets/available` endpoint
to list dataset types you can create along with their available fields.

The `fields` property is optional. If not specified, all available fields
will be enabled.

For zone-level datasets use the zone-scoped endpoint: POST /zones/{zone_id}/logs/explorer/datasets

For dataset field definitions, see: https://developers.cloudflare.com/logs/logpush/logpush-job/datasets/

fields.description:
Controls which fields the API ingests. Defaults to all available
fields when absent.

enabled.description: Whether the API includes this field in log ingest.

allOf.description:
A Log Explorer dataset summary. List endpoints return this type and omit
field configuration; use the single-dataset endpoint to retrieve it.

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp recording when the API created this dataset.

enabled.description: Whether log ingest is currently active for this dataset.

object_id.description: Public ID of the account or zone that owns this dataset.

object_type.description: Whether this dataset belongs to an account or a zone.

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp recording when the API last updated this dataset.

fields.description: The field configuration for this dataset.

enabled.description: Whether the API includes this field in log ingest.

400.description: Invalid request, unsupported dataset, or invalid field configuration.

403.description: The caller lacks permission or entitlement to access this resource.

404.description: The requested resource does not exist.

409.description: A dataset of this type already exists for this account or zone.

POST /zones/{zone_id}/logs/explorer/data.description:
Create a new Log Explorer dataset for the zone.

Use the `/zones/{zone_id}/logs/explorer/datasets/available` endpoint
to list dataset types you can create along with their available fields.

The `fields` property is optional. If not specified, all available fields
will be enabled.

For account-level datasets use the account-scoped endpoint: POST /accounts/{account_id}/logs/explorer/datasets

For dataset field definitions, see: https://developers.cloudflare.com/logs/logpush/logpush-job/datasets/

PUT /accounts/{account_id}/logs/explorer.description: Updates the enabled state and/or field configuration of an account dataset.

enabled.description: Whether to enable or disable log ingest for this dataset.

fields.description:
Controls which fields the API ingests after the update. Defaults
to all available fields when absent.

enabled.description: Whether the API includes this field in log ingest.

allOf.description:
A Log Explorer dataset summary. List endpoints return this type and omit
field configuration; use the single-dataset endpoint to retrieve it.

enabled.description: Whether the API includes this field in log ingest.

400.description: Invalid request, unsupported dataset, or invalid field configuration.

403.description: The caller lacks permission or entitlement to access this resource.

404.description: The requested resource does not exist.
